description: Wave 7: Veshan non-combat roles. Civilians, artisans, diplomats, religious, children. Showing a martial culture has more than warriors.
style_prefix: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background
negative: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

subjects.prompt: tall dignified reptilian alien with aged olive-green overlapping scales and a polished crest ridge bearing a diplomatic house-seal cap, amber slit-pupil eyes that evaluate every word, a relaxed tail showing practiced calm, wearing formal dark leather robes with bronze clasps and crimson trim instead of armor, a diplomatic seal medallion on a chain, a document scroll case on the belt, soft leather boots shaped for digitigrade feet, this is a Veshan who fights with words instead of blades and his house sent him because they value that

broad muscular female reptilian alien with dark grey-green scales and enormous scarred forearms from rivet work, a prominent crest ridge with protective goggles pushed up on it, amber eyes squinting from years of welding, a thick powerful tail used for balance on scaffolding, wearing a heavy canvas work apron over leather coveralls with hull-plating burn marks, thick welding gauntlets hanging from belt clips, magnetic boots for working on ship hulls, she builds warships and her craft is honored as highly as fighting

middle-aged female reptilian alien with warm bronze-olive scales and a careful calculating expression, moderate crest ridge with a small house-trader badge, amber eyes that appraise everything, a relaxed coiled tail, wearing practical dark leather traveling clothes with bronze buckles and many pockets, a reinforced trade satchel, a counting device on a wrist strap, comfortable traveling boots, even in trade her posture says she could fight if she had to

old reptilian alien with faded grey-green scales and a tall crest ridge bearing ceremonial bone carvings, cloudy amber eyes that see further than the physical world, a slow deliberate tail, wearing heavy dark robes in deep crimson and black with bronze chain links connecting the panels, a ritual blade on the belt that is symbolic not functional, bone prayer tokens hanging from the waist, bare digitigrade feet because priests walk the bare ground of the ancestors

young female reptilian alien with bright olive-green scales showing youth, a small developing crest ridge, wide curious amber eyes, a restless tail, wearing a simple dark leather tunic with a healer trainee sash in white across the chest, a small medical pouch at the hip with basic wound dressings, soft boots, her hands are still too clean — she has not treated her first real wound yet

massive old reptilian alien with dark scales covered in a lifetime of reflected battle scars from watching thousands of fights, a wide heavy crest ridge bearing the arena master seal, amber eyes that have judged countless duels, an enormous tail scarred at the base, wearing ceremonial dark bronze half-armor over one shoulder and a judge sash across the chest, a blunted ritual blade for starting and stopping matches, he has never fought in the arena himself but every warrior respects him

stocky reptilian alien with warm brown scales and a broad friendly snout for his species, a moderate crest with food-splatter stains that he has stopped trying to clean, amber eyes with warmth, a content tail, wearing a heavy leather cooking apron stained with years of meals over basic dark leather clothes, thick heat-resistant gloves, a cleaver and a ladle hanging from the belt as naturally as a warrior wears a sword, he feeds the house and that makes him essential

gangly teenage reptilian alien with patchy dark green scales that have not fully developed their adult pattern, a crest ridge just starting to grow above the brow line, anxious amber eyes too big for the face, a thin whippy tail that betrays every emotion, wearing a plain dark hide training tunic that is too short because he is growing faster than his clothes can keep up, basic sandals, a practice stick instead of a real weapon, he is all legs and elbows and barely contained energy

large gentle female reptilian alien with warm dark amber-brown scales and a smooth wide crest showing maturity, calm amber eyes, a heavy protective tail that curls around when she sits, wearing comfortable layered dark leather robes with a wide belt and many pouches for carrying supplies, soft-soled boots for quiet movement, a temperature monitoring device on her wrist for checking the hatchery, she moves slowly and deliberately because everything she carries is precious

ancient reptilian alien with pale faded scales showing advanced age and exile, a crest ridge filed flat in the mark of permanent dishonor, dim amber eyes, a thin limp tail, wearing a ragged dark cloak over whatever scraps he could gather — no house colors no bronze no marks of any kind, bare clawed feet, a walking stick, he was expelled from his house decades ago and has lived alone ever since, the filed crest tells every Veshan who sees him exactly what happened

tall reptilian alien Veshan warrior wearing a Compact-style steel-blue pressed fabric uniform with machine-made rectangular patches and stamped metal buttons, regulation trousers designed for human legs not digitigrade joints, human shoes that do not accommodate clawed feet, a human-style belt with a human holster, the entire outfit was designed for a human body and fights against every aspect of Veshan anatomy and culture

adorable small dragon creature with big sparkly eyes and tiny wings and pink pastel scales, wearing a cute little crown and a tiny cape with stars on it, sitting in a cheerful pose with a happy smile, the creature is designed to sell plush toys not to be a member of a warrior civilization with its own deep cultural identity, everything about it undermines the Veshan as a serious species
